---
title: "VisualMath"
subtitle: "Interactive, browser-based visualizations of numerical methods."
listing:
  contents:
    - root-finding/bisection-method.qmd
    - root-finding/fixed-point.qmd
    - root-finding/newton.qmd
  type: grid
  sort: false
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---
